name: Hillside Condominium 1–4
area: Huay Kaew Rd — walk to CMU front gate, Maya, Nimman
note: The single biggest walk-in near CMU. Four large towers on Huay Kaew with constant rental turnover; each has its own juristic office that keeps a list of owners renting out. Hillside 4 is the largest. Right at the north end of your band.

name: Green Hill Place / Green Hill Condominium
area: Huay Kaew Rd, near CMU / 700-Year Stadium side
note: Established Huay Kaew condo with steady owner-rented stock. Ask the juristic office on the ground floor. Verify on the ground.

name: The Resort Condominium
area: Huay Kaew Rd (soi off Huay Kaew), near CMU
note: Low-rise resort-style condo a short walk from CMU front gate. Worth asking reception/juristic for vacant owner units. Verify on the ground.

name: Punna Residence Oasis (Nimmana / CMU)
area: West Nimman / Huay Kaew, near CMU
note: Popular with CMU staff/students; several Punna projects on this side. Confirm the specific building and office on site. Verify on the ground.

name: Suthep Hill House
note: 2BR seen ~฿12k. Building-managed; walk in and ask the front office — they hold the keys and owner contacts. Squarely in the band.

name: JJ Hometown
note: 2BR ~฿12.5k seen. On-site management; ask at the office.

name: North 4 Condominium
note: 2BR ~฿16k seen (BaanFinder). Ask the juristic office for vacant/owner-rented units.

name: OnePlus Business Park 1
note: 2BR ~฿18.5k seen. One of several 'One Plus' projects on the Canal Rd / Suthep side.

name: The Star Hill Condo
note: Seen on Thailand-Property & in group posts (2BR 67 m² listed ฿25k there, but turnover is high — ask the juristic for cheaper owner deals). Pet-friendly building.

name: Chom Doi Condominium
note: ~12-storey with mountain views, 2BR ~฿16k seen. Ground-floor juristic office keeps a list of owners renting out.

name: Chom Doi House (round tower)
note: 2BR ~฿14k seen. Distinctive round tower on the Canal Rd / Suthep side; ask reception.

name: Galae Thong Tower
area: Suthep / Canal Rd area, toward Doi Suthep foothills
note: Long-standing tower on the Suthep side with mountain views and regular owner rentals. Ask the juristic office. Verify on the ground.

name: Condos around Suan Dok / Maharaj Hospital
area: Suthep Rd, around Maharaj Nakorn (Suan Dok) Hospital
note: Rooks Condotel (2BR ฿20k, Doi Suthep view) was found here this run. Several apartment blocks line Suthep Rd by the hospital — walk in and ask front desks. South-central part of your band.

name: Apartments along Soi Wat Umong / lower Suthep
area: Soi Wat Umong & lower Suthep Rd (south end of band)
note: The southern edge of your band (north of Wat Umong) has many small managed apartment buildings catering to CMU staff and med students. Mostly walk-in only, rarely listed online. Verify on the ground.

name: My Hip Condo
area: Huay Kaew / Santitham side (east edge of band)
note: 2BR ~฿18k seen. Ask the juristic office; close to Nimman/CMU but sits on the eastern edge of your band — confirm it's west of the Santitham line.
